message:
refactor: migrate std::env::var to dotenvy::var for env lookups

Replace bare std::env::var calls with dotenvy::var across six source
files to ensure .env file values are respected consistently. dotenvy::var
first checks the process environment, then falls back to the nearest
.env file—matching the pattern already established elsewhere in the
codebase.

Files changed:
- src/daemon/protocol.rs: USER lookup for socket path derivation
- src/sources/install.rs: HOME lookup in test helper
- src/sources/probe.rs: HOME lookup in live-probe integration test;
  also refactors a match-based assert into matches!() + if-let for
  the CassStatus::Indexed check (stylistic, unrelated to dotenvy)
- src/ui/app.rs: CASS_DISABLE_ANIMATIONS and CASS_BOCPD env checks
- src/ui/theme.rs: env_truthy() and env_is() helper functions
- src/ui/trace.rs: TERM and COLORTERM lookups for SystemInfo

No behavioral change for users without a .env file—dotenvy::var
returns the same value as std::env::var when no .env is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,8 +77,8 @@ impl SystemInfo {
             os: std::env::consts::OS.to_string(),
             arch: std::env::consts::ARCH.to_string(),
             cass_version: env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION").to_string(),
-            term: std::env::var("TERM").ok(),
-            colorterm: std::env::var("COLORTERM").ok(),
+            term: dotenvy::var("TERM").ok(),
+            colorterm: dotenvy::var("COLORTERM").ok(),
             terminal_size: None, // filled by caller if available
             timestamp: chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),
         }
